summary: Implemented US-016 pairing references. Created `findCardByNumber` helper in `src/domain/findCard.ts`. Updated `CardVisual` to accept optional `pairedCard`, `onPairClick`, and `children` props, rendering a 'Pairs with' section with the paired card's prompt as a clickable button when `pairedCard` is provided. Added `data-card-number` attribute to the article element for scroll targeting. Updated `BrowseAllCards` to resolve pairsWith references via a Map lookup and render pairing sections as children of CardVisual (using a simpler text-only 'Pairs with' button to avoid duplicate text conflicts in the browse grid), with scroll-to-card behavior on click. Added CSS for pairing sections in both CardVisual and BrowseAllCards modules. All 306 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
